title: Permission error deleting from tmp folder
body:
Hi, I am running podman on a Openshift 4.14 container, rootful and unprivileged, with overlayfs. When I try to build a docker image I get warnings like this afet every RUN step 

```
17:33:37  time="2025-03-27T16:33:37Z" level=warning msg="pkg/bind: error detaching \"/var/tmp/buildah2331429047/mnt/buildah-bind-target-1\": permission denied"
17:33:37  time="2025-03-27T16:33:37Z" level=warning msg="pkg/bind: error removing \"/var/tmp/buildah2331429047/mnt/buildah-bind-target-1\": device or resource busy"
17:33:37  time="2025-03-27T16:33:37Z" level=warning msg="pkg/bind: error removing \"/var/tmp/buildah2331429047/mnt\": directory not empty"
```
This is the output of podman info


comments.body:
Hi @GolanTrevize10 

We have seen an issue like this here: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/5669#issuecomment-2677934135

Could you try using vfs rather than overlayfs? 

Checking the code where the error is coming from I don't see any extra logging sadly: https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/898fbb2d25c66f6613342a7084df21de7d0afab8/bind/mount.go#L64-L111

As there is a `permission denied` error are you able to check if there are any errors logged in the systems journal. 

There is also a `device or resource busy` error, are there any issues with the systems storage? Maybe low disk space on /tmp?

Are you able to reproduce this issue?

Are you able to provide a simple reproducer?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

is anyone investigating in this?

Same problems with rootless podman running in gitlab-runner (also based on podman)

```
time="2026-03-01T21:43:09Z" level=warning msg="pkg/bind: error detaching \"/var/tmp/buildah3387195596/mnt/buildah-bind-target-1\": permission denied"
time="2026-03-01T21:43:09Z" level=warning msg="pkg/bind: error removing \"/var/tmp/buildah3387195596/mnt/buildah-bind-target-1\": device or resource busy"
time="2026-03-01T21:43:09Z" level=warning msg="pkg/bind: error removing \"/var/tmp/buildah3387195596/mnt\": directory not empty"
```

for any pipeline with this runner config

```
  [runners.docker]
    host = "unix:///run/podman/podman.sock"
    tls_verify = false
    image = "alpine:latest"
    privileged = false
    disable_entrypoint_overwrite = false
    oom_kill_disable = false
    disable_cache = true
    volumes = ["/run/user/10015/podman/podman.sock:/run/docker.sock:z", "/run/user/10015/podman/podman.sock:/run/podman/podman.sock:z", "/home/gitlab/.cache/gitlab-runner/builds:/builds:z", "/home/gitlab/.cache/gitlab-runner/cache:/cache:z"]
    extra_hosts = ["harbor.sws.internal:host-gateway"]
    shm_size = 0
    network_mtu = 0
```

Having also privileged runners (still rootless) with this config

```
  [runners.docker]
    host = "unix:///run/podman/podman.sock"
    tls_verify = false
    image = "alpine:latest"
    privileged = true
    disable_entrypoint_overwrite = false
    oom_kill_disable = false
    disable_cache = true
    volumes = ["/run/user/10015/podman/podman.sock:/run/docker.sock:z", "/run/user/10015/podman/podman.sock:/run/podman/podman.sock:z", "/home/gitlab/.cache/gitlab-runner/builds:/builds:z", "/home/gitlab/.cache/gitlab-runner/cache:/cache:z"]
    extra_hosts = ["harbor.sws.internal:host-gateway"]
    shm_size = 0
    network_mtu = 0
```

fixes the problem 

But, i don't really understand why this happens on cleanup and not already when creating those resources?
